scripts.build: npm run build -w @dsd/event-schema && npm run build -w @dsd/audit-runtime && npm run build -w @dsd/runtime-sync && npm run build -w @dsd/clinical-runtime && npm run build -w @dsd/replay-runtime && npm run build -w @dsd/ui-safety
scripts.test: npm run build -w @dsd/ui-safety && npm run test -w @dsd/clinical-runtime && npm run test -w @dsd/ui-safety
scripts.test:gate:replay: npm run build && npm run test:gate:replay -w @dsd/clinical-runtime
scripts.test:gate:queue-stabilization: npm run build && npm run test:gate:queue-stabilization -w @dsd/clinical-runtime
scripts.test:gate:long-session: npm run build && npm run test:gate:long-session -w @dsd/clinical-runtime
scripts.test:gate:cross-panel: npm run build && npm run test:gate:cross-panel -w @dsd/ui-safety
scripts.test:gate:stale-degraded: npm run build && npm run test:gate:stale-degraded -w @dsd/ui-safety
scripts.test:gate:human-stable: npm run build && npm run test:gate:human-stable -w @dsd/ui-safety
scripts.web:build: npm run build && npm run build -w @dsd/web
